# validateFunctionGraph

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for validateFunctionGraph

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useValidateFunctionGraphMutation(); mutate({ input: { graphId: '<UUID>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useValidateFunctionGraphMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useValidateFunctionGraphMutation();
mutate({ input: { graphId: '<UUID>' } });
```
